_publications._publicationTitle: Identifying Symptoms of Distress in Youth Living with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1).

_contextSnippet: Nearly 80% of caregivers, 87.5% of medical providers and 65.8% of patients reported that the DT was very easy to complete...97.4% of caregivers, 96.3% of medical providers and 92.4% of patients reported that it 'didn't bother me at all'
resourceName: Distress Thermometer Acceptability and Feasibility Scales
details: High acceptability: 65.8% of patients, 80% of caregivers, and 87.5% of medical providers reported the DT was very easy to complete. 92.4% of patients, 97.4% of caregivers, and 96.3% of providers reported it didn't bother them at all
